title: Roadmap — week of Jun 23
body:
Priority 1: make Notes Workspace usable as real software, not a demo.

- note creation, delete, rename
- keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+N, F2, Del, arrows)
- visual polish: spacing, typography, hover + selected states

Then actually use it for five minutes. If I won't, nobody will.

title: How the three windows talk
body:
List, Editor and Inspector are separate windows — separate Flutter engines — in one process. They never reach into each other. They persist to a shared JSON file and broadcast over AppBus; each window reloads on the topics it cares about.

That single rule is the whole multi-window model.

title: Shortcuts to remember
body:
Ctrl+N  new note
F2      rename (or double-click a row)
Del     delete (with undo)
↑ / ↓   move selection
Ctrl+S  save now (it also autosaves)
Ctrl+W  close the editor window

title: Groceries
body:
oat milk
coffee
olive oil
spinach
the good bread

title: Idea: spatial inspector
body: What if the inspector could float as a shaped, translucent surface over the editor instead of a rectangle beside it? Park it for the preview program — earn it through use first.
